mapper.select: SELECT A.EML_NO , A.EML_FILE_GROUP_NO , B.EML_RCVR_ID , A.EML_SNDR_ID , A.EML_TTL , A.EML_CN , A.EML_SNDNG_DT , A.EML_EMRG_YN , B.EML_IMPT_YN -- , B.EML_RCPTN_YN -- , B.EML_RCVNG_DT -- , B.EML_DEL_YN -- , A.EML_SNDR_DEL_YN , A.EML_OTSD_RCVR_ADDR , A.EML_OTSD_SNDR_ADDR , A.EML_STTS , A.FILE_ID , C.EMP_NM , C.EMP_JBGD , C.EMP_PROFILE FROM EMAIL A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMAIL_RECEIVER B ON A.EML_NO=B.EML_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE C ON A.EML_SNDR_ID=C.EMP_ID WHERE B.EML_RCVR_ID=#{emlRcvrId}

SELECT A.EML_NO , A.EML_FILE_GROUP_NO , A.EML_RCVR_ID , A.EML_SNDR_ID , A.EML_TTL , A.EML_CN , A.EML_SNDNG_DT , A.EML_RCVNG_DT , A.EML_EMRG_YN , A.EML_RCPTN_YN , A.EML_SNDR_DEL_YN , A.EML_OTSD_YN , A.EML_OTSD_RCVR_ADDR , A.EML_OTSD_SNDR_ADDR , A.EML_STTS , A.FILE_ID , B.EMP_NM FROM EMAIL A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT G.EML_NO , LISTAGG(G.EMP_NM || '(' || G.DEPT_NM || ')', ',') EMP_NM FROM (SELECT A.EML_RCVR_ID , A.EML_NO , A.EMP_ID , B.EMP_NM , C.DEPT_NM , A.EML_RCVR_TYPE FROM TEAM1_202509F.EMAIL_RECEIVER A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT C ON B.DEPT_CD = C.DEPT_CD WHERE A.EML_RCVR_TYPE = '수신자' AND A.EML_NO = #{emlNo}) G GROUP BY G.EML_NO) B ON A.EML_NO = B.EML_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT G.EML_NO , LISTAGG(G.EMP_NM || '(' || G.DEPT_NM || ')', ',') EMP_NM FROM (SELECT A.EML_RCVR_ID , A.EML_NO , A.EMP_ID , B.EMP_NM , C.DEPT_NM , A.EML_RCVR_TYPE FROM TEAM1_202509F.EMAIL_RECEIVER A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT C ON B.DEPT_CD = C.DEPT_CD WHERE A.EML_RCVR_TYPE = '참조자' AND A.EML_NO = #{emlNo}) G GROUP BY G.EML_NO) C ON A.EML_NO = C.EML_NO
WHERE A.EML_NO = #{emlNo}

SELECT A.FILE_ID, A.EMP_ID, A.FILE_DT, A.FILE_DEL_YN, A.FILE_STTS, B.FILE_DTL_ID, B.FILE_DTL_PATH, B.FILE_DTL_SAVE_NM, B.FILE_DTL_O_NM, B.FILE_DTL_EXT, B.FILE_DTL_DT, B.FILE_DTL_DEL_YN FROM FILE_TB A LEFT OUTER JOIN FILE_DETAIL B ON A.FILE_ID = B.FILE_ID WHERE A.FILE_ID = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_DETAIL ( FILE_DTL_ID , FILE_ID , FILE_DTL_PATH , FILE_DTL_SAVE_NM , FILE_DTL_O_NM , FILE_DTL_EXT , FILE_DTL_DT , EMP_ID , FILE_DTL_DEL_YN) SELECT SEQ_FILE_DTL_ID.NEXTVAL , #{newFileId} , FILE_DTL_PATH , FILE_DTL_SAVE_NM , FILE_DTL_O_NM , FILE_DTL_EXT , SYSDATE , #{empId} , 'N' FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE FILE_DTL_ID = #{oldFileDtlId}

select SEQ_EML_RECEIVER_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TEAM1_202509F.EMAIL_RECEIVER (EML_RCVR_ID, EML_NO, EMP_ID, EML_RCVR_TYPE) VALUES(#{emlRcvrId}, #{emlNo}, #{empId}, #{emlRcvrType})

if.if: AND AL.EML_SNDR_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR AL.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

sql.if: AND ( EML_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR EML_CN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR EML_SNDR_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.EML_NO DESC) RNUM , A.EML_NO , A.EML_FILE_GROUP_NO , A.EML_SNDR_ID , A.EML_TTL , A.EML_CN , A.EML_SNDNG_DT , A.EML_EMRG_YN , A.EML_SNDR_DEL_YN , A.EML_OTSD_YN , A.EML_OTSD_RCVR_ADDR , A.EML_OTSD_SNDR_ADDR , A.EML_STTS , A.FILE_ID , C.EMP_NM , C.EMP_JBGD , D.DEPT_NM FROM EMAIL A JOIN EMPLOYEE C ON A.EML_SNDR_ID=C.EMP_ID JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON C.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE A.EML_SNDR_ID=#{empId}
)

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.EML_NO DESC) RNUM , A.EML_NO , A.EML_FILE_GROUP_NO , A.EML_SNDR_ID , A.EML_TTL , A.EML_CN , A.EML_SNDNG_DT , A.EML_EMRG_YN , A.EML_SNDR_DEL_YN , A.EML_OTSD_YN , A.EML_OTSD_RCVR_ADDR , A.EML_OTSD_SNDR_ADDR , A.EML_STTS , A.FILE_ID , C.EMP_NM , C.EMP_JBGD , D.DEPT_NM FROM EMAIL A JOIN EMPLOYEE C ON A.EML_SNDR_ID=C.EMP_ID JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON C.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE A.EML_SNDR_ID=#{empId}
) T WHERE RNUM BETWEEN (#{currentPage} * #{pageNum}) - ( #{pageNum} - 1) AND (#{currentPage} * #{pageNum})

SELECT A.* , C.EMP_NM , C.EMP_JBGD , C.EMP_PROFILE , D.DEPT_NM FROM EMAIL_RECEIVER A LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE C ON A.EMP_ID=C.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON C.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE EML_NO=#{emlNo} AND A.EML_RCVR_TYPE !='참조자' --참조자는 안가져와도 됨
SELECT A.* , C.EMP_NM , C.EMP_JBGD , C.EMP_PROFILE , D.DEPT_NM FROM EMAIL_RECEIVER A LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE C ON A.EMP_ID=C.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON C.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE EML_NO=#{emlNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.EML_NO DESC) RNUM , A.EML_NO , A.EML_FILE_GROUP_NO , A.EML_SNDR_ID , A.EML_TTL , A.EML_CN , A.EML_SNDNG_DT , A.EML_EMRG_YN , A.EML_SNDR_DEL_YN , A.EML_OTSD_RCVR_ADDR , A.EML_OTSD_SNDR_ADDR , A.EML_STTS , A.FILE_ID , C.EMP_NM , C.EMP_JBGD , D.DEPT_NM FROM EMAIL A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE C ON A.EML_SNDR_ID=C.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON C.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD AND (A.EML_SNDR_DEL_YN='N')
)

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.EML_NO DESC) RNUM , A.EML_NO , A.EML_FILE_GROUP_NO , A.EML_SNDR_ID , A.EML_TTL , A.EML_CN , A.EML_SNDNG_DT , A.EML_EMRG_YN , A.EML_SNDR_DEL_YN , A.EML_OTSD_RCVR_ADDR , A.EML_OTSD_SNDR_ADDR , A.EML_STTS , A.FILE_ID , C.EMP_NM , C.EMP_JBGD , D.DEPT_NM FROM EMAIL A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE C ON A.EML_SNDR_ID=C.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON C.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD AND (A.EML_SNDR_DEL_YN='N')
) T

SELECT EML_RCVR_ID , EML_TTL , EML_EMRG_YN , DEPT_NM , EMP_NM , EML_SNDNG_DT , COUNT(*) OVER() AS cnt FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.EML_NO DESC) RNUM , A.EML_NO , A.EML_FILE_GROUP_NO , B.EML_RCVR_ID AS EML_RCVR_ID , A.EML_SNDR_ID , A.EML_TTL AS EML_TTL , A.EML_CN , A.EML_SNDNG_DT AS EML_SNDNG_DT , A.EML_EMRG_YN AS EML_EMRG_YN , B.EML_IMPT_YN -- , B.EML_RCPTN_YN -- , B.EML_RCVNG_DT -- , B.EML_DEL_YN -- , B.EML_RCVR_TYPE -- , A.EML_SNDR_DEL_YN , A.EML_OTSD_RCVR_ADDR , A.EML_OTSD_SNDR_ADDR , A.EML_STTS , A.FILE_ID , C.EMP_NM AS EMP_NM , C.EMP_JBGD , D.DEPT_NM AS DEPT_NM FROM EMAIL A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMAIL_RECEIVER B ON A.EML_NO=B.EML_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE C ON A.EML_SNDR_ID=C.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON C.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE B.EMP_ID=#{empId} AND (B.EML_DEL_YN='N') AND B.EML_RCPTN_YN ='N' AND B.EML_RCVR_TYPE !='참조자' --참조는 알람 안띄워도 됨 AND A.EML_SNDR_DEL_YN='N' ) order by EML_SNDNG_DT desc
mapper.update: update EMAIL_RECEIVER set EML_RCVNG_DT=sysdate, EML_RCPTN_YN='Y' where EML_RCVR_ID=#{emlRcvrId}
update EMAIL_RECEIVER set EML_IMPT_YN='Y' where EML_RCVR_ID=#{emlRcvrId}
update EMAIL_RECEIVER set EML_IMPT_YN='N' where EML_RCVR_ID=#{emlRcvrId}
update EMAIL_RECEIVER set EML_DEL_YN='Y' where EML_RCVR_ID=#{emlRcvrId}
update EMAIL_RECEIVER set EML_DEL_PMNT_YN='Y' where EML_RCVR_ID=#{emlRcvrId}
update EMAIL_RECEIVER set EML_DEL_YN='N' where EML_RCVR_ID=#{emlRcvrId}
update EMAIL set EML_SNDR_DEL_YN='Y' where EML_NO=#{emlNo}
update EMAIL_RECEIVER set EML_BOX_NO=#{emlBoxNo} where EML_RCVR_ID=#{emlRcvrId}
mapper.select: SELECT EML_BOX_NO ,EML_BOX_UP_NO ,EMP_ID ,EML_BOX_TTL ,LEVEL as "level" FROM EMAIL_BOX WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} START WITH EML_BOX_UP_NO IS NULL OR EML_BOX_UP_NO = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR EML_BOX_NO = EML_BOX_UP_NO ORDER SIBLINGS BY EML_BOX_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMAIL_BOX (EML_BOX_NO, EML_BOX_TTL, EML_BOX_UP_NO, EMP_ID) VALUES (SEQ_EML_BOX.NEXTVAL, #{emlBoxTtl}, #{emlBoxUpNo}, #{empId})
mapper.select: select count(*) from EMAIL_RECEIVER where EML_BOX_NO=#{emlBoxNo} and EMP_ID=#{empId} and EML_DEL_YN='N'
